goal: Gate every active-config Save path on Safe Live Save Mode so no save can trigger an accidental compositor reload.

savePathAudit.activeConfigPilot: env-gated ignored test only; retains its own fifteen gates and restore
savePathAudit.directApplySettingChangeInUi: eliminated - guard test asserts window.rs contains no direct apply_setting_change call

validation: cargo test green incl. new gate tests
nextRecommendedWork: none for gating; consider persisting misc:disable_autoreload=true via the gated scalar save so the mode survives restarts

proven: Safe Live Save Mode card with Inactive state and the 'autoreload is active' blocked reason plus Enable/Disable controls (Config runs)

dead-man countdown and blocked-reason surfaces unchanged
